description: Valid maker output record with positive case
feature: Contact Exchange on Price Validation Failure

scenarios.title: Member contacts exchange on price validation failure
scenarios.intent: Validates that members contact exchange when orders fail price check
given: a member with valid LME session
an order that has failed price validation check

evidence.quote: Where an order or trade fails the price validation check, Members are required to contact the Exchange.

description: Valid maker output with obligation rule requiring positive and negative cases

scenarios.title: Member provides additional information when required
given: a member with valid LME session
when: the Exchange requests additional information for correction
then: the member provides the required information

evidence.quote: the Member may be required to provide such additional information as the Exchange deems necessary.

scenarios.title: Member fails to provide required information
scenarios.intent: Validates consequence when member does not provide info
given: a member with valid LME session
when: the Exchange requests additional information and member does not respond
then: the order or trade remains unsubmitted

evidence.quote: the Member may be required to provide such additional information as the Exchange deems necessary.
